title: Hiring Software Engineer at Nature's Basket Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Hiring Software Engineer at Nature's Basket Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Nature's Basket Holdings Services family as a Software Engineer in Srinagar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
